productDisplayName: Puma Men Bolt LS Black Belt
description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing. This Bolt LS leather belt from puma's Usain Bolt collection, with its stylish buckle, is all set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire. Length: 90 cm Made of leather for durability and style Press clasp with a stylish buckle to hold the belt in place Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
